repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue LP/SVAR, structural IRF, or fourth-cumulant support-function proposal

published_prior_art.cite: DrautzburgWright2023 refines sign-restricted VARs by independence but does not give an LP/SVAR support-function margin; Guay2021 and LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017 are higher-moment SVAR identification papers

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest catalogue entries concern panel row-space or non-time-series partial-ID pasting

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021, LanneLuoto2021, and Read2022 provide higher-moment identification/GMM or sign-zero algorithms, not a two-shock LP/SVAR non-diagonalizing witness

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State an explicit continuity lemma showing when lim_{epsilon downarrow 0} h_epsilon(w;P)=h_SVAR(w;P), so chi_w is not vulnerable to closure/pathology objections.

Add Montiel Olea, Plagborg-Moller, and Qian 2022 as a direct higher-moment SVAR cautionary comparator, since Drautzburg-Wright cites it and it sharpens the boundary between higher-moment identification and overclaiming.
For Conjecture 2, spell out whether the witness ranges over SO(2) rotations only or all of O(2), and add the reflected diagonalizing angles if the latter is intended.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1-2 as open kernels and prioritize the two-shock witness plus the h_epsilon continuity lemma.
